measurements.finding: No significant timing difference. ML-DSA-65 verify is constant-time.
measurements.name: signature_verification

measurements.finding: Minor timing difference between first-byte and last-byte mismatch. Low risk: AgentId is SHA-256(public_key), attacker cannot control which byte differs.
measurements.name: agent_id_comparison

measurements.finding: No significant timing difference between hit and miss.
measurements.name: replay_cache_lookup

measurements.finding: Invalid input rejected faster (early exit). Not a security concern: CBOR is inside encrypted QUIC streams.
measurements.name: cbor_decode
